about:
I'm Joshua Vicente, a Full Stack Developer based in the Philippines. I started in design and front-end development, but I became increasingly interested in what happens behind the interface—how data moves, how business workflows are structured, and how different parts of a system work together.

Today, I build full-stack applications using Django, Django REST Framework, Nuxt.js, Vue.js, and PostgreSQL. I've worked with local and international clients on e-commerce platforms, event systems, administrative tools, and custom business applications.

Outside development, I previously taught Information Technology and currently help lead TECHSAVVY Community in Misamis Occidental. I've also been invited to speak at technology and educational events.

I like building software people actually use.

experience.summary: Designing and developing production web applications for local and international clients.
highlights: Built full-stack web applications using Django, Django REST Framework, Nuxt.js, Vue.js, and PostgreSQL.
Developed RESTful APIs and integrated Stripe, PayMongo, Google Analytics 4, Google Tag Manager, and Meta Pixel.
Worked directly with clients from requirements and system planning through deployment, maintenance, and feature development.

experience.summary: Leading technology initiatives, community programs, partnerships, and developer mentorship across Misamis Occidental.
highlights: Lead strategic planning and technology initiatives as Officer-in-Charge and Core Leader.
Collaborate with schools, government agencies, and industry partners to organize technology programs and community events.
Oversee the development and maintenance of the organization's digital platforms and internal systems.
Mentor aspiring developers through workshops, technical guidance, and career development initiatives.
Support partnerships, sponsorships, and organizational growth through technical leadership and project management.

experience.summary: Delivered instruction in Information Technology courses while mentoring students in programming and digital technologies.
highlights: Taught programming, web development, and other IT-related subjects.
Prepared instructional materials, laboratory activities, and student assessments.
Guided students in developing software projects using modern development practices.
Mentored students in technical problem-solving and career preparation within the IT industry.
Fostered an engaging learning environment focused on collaboration, creativity, and practical technology application.

experience.location: San Francisco, California, United States · Remote
experience.summary: Collaborated with a remote development team to build responsive front-end solutions for international client projects.
highlights: Developed responsive user interfaces using Nuxt.js, Vue.js, Tailwind CSS, HTML5, and JavaScript.
Built reusable UI components to improve consistency and maintainability across client projects.
Applied user experience and responsive design practices across desktop and mobile layouts.
Collaborated with other interns and the development team using Git-based development workflows.
Contributed to front-end development for the Buscaolas and Kokoro Foods client projects.

speaking.event: Code Camp Season 4 2026 Whole Day Tech Seminar
speaking.description: Participated as a resource speaker during a whole-day technology seminar organized in coordination with CICT NMSC faculty and students, supporting technology education and aspiring student innovators.

speaking.topic: Bridging Design and Backends in Nuxt.js
speaking.description: Shared insights on responsive systems, state synchronization, and reactive layouts.

speaking.topic: Modern E-Commerce Orchestration with Django & Vue
speaking.description: Addressed checkout flow state tracking and resilience during API failures.
